title: Aricsen Compostable 50 Pack 8x9 Inch Disposable Square Small Lunch Box Takeout Containers with Lid To Go Take Out Clamshell for Food, Eco-Friendly Biodegradable Bagasse, PFAS-Free, Unbleached Brown
features: Clamshell Container: Serve full Meals in Convenient Style Compostable Food Containers. Perfect for serving a Main Dish with Sides. The Biodegradable to-go Containers are an excellent choice for Daily Meals or Restaurants, Food Trucks, To-go orders, Special Events, and other types of Food Service Environments.

100% Sugarcane Fiber: These Take Out Containers are Made of 100% Sugarcane Fiber, which is a Sustainable, Renewable, and Biodegradable Material. The Disposable Container is a terrific alternative to Traditional Paper or Plastic, providing the same Sturdy Function and Easy Cleanup while being Completely Tree - and Plastic-Free.

100% Compostable: It’s Made from 100% Sugarcane Fiber, the Container can be Commercially Composted (no need to send it to a landfill). The Plate offers a Disposable Design that will Degrade Quickly, which means Convenient Cleanup for You, your Customers, and the Planet.

Hot or Cold Use: These to-go Clamshells are suitable for both Hot and Cold foods. It provides Reliable Strength and Does Not have any Plastic or Wax Lining. These Containers are Microwaveable & Freezeable. Oil and Cut- resistance note: Hot foods may cause the Container to perspire and generate condensation at the bottom.

Perfect for Any Occasion: With a wide range of products and a classic design, Stack Man provides premium environmental -friendly products and peace of mind that you are providing all-natural organic tableware for your family and friends. Perfect for Camping, Picnics, Lunches, Catering, BBQs, Events, Parties, Weddings and Restaurants.
description: Aricsen 100% Compostable Clamshell Take Out Food Containers, Heavy-Duty Quality to go Containers, Natural Disposable Bagasse, Eco-Friendly Biodegradable Made of Sugar Cane Fibers
